reason: 2026-07-03 audit: object overclaim — Q937378 'logarithmic scale' currently exact/high against Real.logb, but a logarithmic scale is a measurement/display convention (equal distances = equal ratios, e.g. decibels, Richter scale) that USES logarithms, not the logb function itself. Real.logb is the general-base log function; logarithmic scale is a related application, not identical to it. Downgrade exact->related.
verify_note: grounding exact/high confirmed; Q937378=measurement scale (orders of magnitude), not logb; exact->related right
